problem.title: Is your business lacking online visibility?
problem.subtitle: You're not alone. Many businesses in Morocco face these same challenges.
problem.p1_desc: Without a website, you lose potential customers daily who are looking for your services on Google.
problem.p2_desc: Social media is great for visibility, but a website is essential for conversion.
problem.p3_desc: An obsolete or non-existent site gives a bad image and drives your prospects to the competition.

solution.title: The solution: a website that converts
solution.subtitle: We create websites that are not just pretty, but generate concrete results for your business.
solution.b1_desc: An attractive user interface that inspires trust and micro-reinforces your brand image.
solution.b2_desc: Your site appears in the top Google results to attract more qualified customers.
solution.b3_desc: A perfect experience on all screens, from smartphones to desktops.
solution.b4_desc: Strategic call-to-actions and fluid navigation to transform visitors into customers.
solution.cta_title: Ready to transform your online presence?

about.title: About DevWeb
about.subtitle: Your trusted partner for your digital transformation in Morocco
about.history_p1: Founded in Marrakech by Sekouti Abdelaziz, DevWeb was born from a simple vision: to make the web accessible to small and medium-sized Moroccan businesses.
about.history_p2: Since 2020, we have been helping entrepreneurs transform their online presence. We believe that every business deserves a professional website, even with a limited budget.
about.history_p3: Our approach: Listen, Understand, Create, Support. We don't just deliver a site, we build a lasting relationship with our clients.
about.mission_subtitle: Transform your visitors into customers through high-performance websites
about.mission_card_desc: Make the web accessible and profitable for businesses in Morocco by creating sites that generate concrete results.
about.vision_card_desc: Become the reference for web development in Morocco by combining technical expertise and understanding of local needs.
about.values_card_desc: Transparency, Excellence, Innovation and Customer Satisfaction. Every project is an opportunity to create something exceptional.
about.skills_subtitle: Complete expertise to meet all your web needs
about.s1_desc: React, Vue, Node.js, HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript
about.s2_desc: Figma, Adobe XD, Responsive Design, Design Systems
about.s3_desc: Google Optimization, Core Web Vitals, Lighthouse
about.ready_subtitle: Let's discuss your project and create the website that will transform your business together.
